name: chr16qh_size_polymorphism
description: 16qh size polymorphism: classical pericentric heterochromatin at 16q11.2 (alpha-satellite + HSat2 + HSat3) varies by 2-7 Mb between individuals. Detected in karyotype as variable 16q11.2 dark band. One of the three classical C-band polymorphism regions (1qh, 9qh, 16qh) and the third instability site in ICF syndrome.

architecture.internal_structure: Mixed alpha-satellite + HSat2 + HSat3 blocks; size 2-9 Mb across population; smaller than 1qh / 9qh but architecturally similar.
